stemHtml: You are flying an instrument approach, and upon reaching the MAPt, you have no visual contact with the runway. – What should you do?

options.a: Level off and continue looking for visual references.
options.b: Immediately initiate the missed approach procedure.
options.c: Continue descending until the visual references are established.
options.d: If CAT II minima are published on the chart, continue down to the CAT II minima.
